message:
feat: auto-verify with read-only reviewer for implementation tasks

Add typed tasks (research/implement/verify) and auto-create a read-only
review task after each implementation task. The reviewer dispatches an
independent subagent that can inspect but not modify the workspace.

Verify prompt: "You may run commands and inspect files but do not write
to the working directory."

This was the winning variant in a 5-way comparison (54% vs 27-45% for
other phrasings). The key insight: letting the reviewer run tests
without creating artifacts balances active verification with preventing
reviewer-caused contamination.

Prompt surfacing fix: task instructions are now shown to the coordinator
when suggesting the next task, so the review prompt actually reaches
the agent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
